queries.question: What program do all visual effects artists have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Programs.name  from Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs join Programs on Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs.program_id = Programs.program_id join Visual_Effects_Artists on Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs.visual_effects_artist_id = Visual_Effects_Artists.artist_id   GROUP BY Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs.program_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs.visual_effects_artist_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Visual_Effects_Artists)

queries.question: What information is there about programs including their versions that are popular among all visual effects artists?
queries.sql: SELECT Programs.name, Programs.version  from Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs join Programs on Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs.program_id = Programs.program_id join Visual_Effects_Artists on Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs.visual_effects_artist_id = Visual_Effects_Artists.artist_id   GROUP BY Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs.program_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs.visual_effects_artist_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Visual_Effects_Artists)

queries.question: Tell me the programs every visual effects artist uses and their versions.
queries.sql: select visual_effects_artists.name , programs.name , programs.version from Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs join Programs on Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs.program_id = Programs.program_id join Visual_Effects_Artists on Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs.visual_effects_artist_id = Visual_Effects_Artists.artist_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 ?version WHERE {
  ?visual_effects_artists_programs a :Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs .
  ?programs a :Programs .
  ?visual_effects_artists_programs p:hasPrograms ?programs .
  ?visual_effects_artists a :Visual_Effects_Artists .
  ?visual_effects_artists_programs p:hasVisual_Effects_Artists ?visual_effects_artists .
  ?visual_effects_artists p:name ?name .
  ?programs p:name ?name2 .
  ?programs p:version ?version .
}

queries.question: What is the version of program common for all visual effects artists?
queries.sql: SELECT Programs.version  from Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs join Programs on Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs.program_id = Programs.program_id join Visual_Effects_Artists on Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs.visual_effects_artist_id = Visual_Effects_Artists.artist_id   GROUP BY Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs.program_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs.visual_effects_artist_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Visual_Effects_Artists)

queries.question: What are the versions of programs associated with each visual effects artists?
queries.sql: select visual_effects_artists.name , programs.version from Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs join Programs on Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs.program_id = Programs.program_id join Visual_Effects_Artists on Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs.visual_effects_artist_id = Visual_Effects_Artists.artist_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?version WHERE {
  ?visual_effects_artists_programs a :Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs .
  ?programs a :Programs .
  ?visual_effects_artists_programs p:hasPrograms ?programs .
  ?visual_effects_artists a :Visual_Effects_Artists .
  ?visual_effects_artists_programs p:hasVisual_Effects_Artists ?visual_effects_artists .
  ?visual_effects_artists p:name ?name .
  ?programs p:version ?version .
}

queries.question: What visual effects artists are there and what programs do they use?
queries.sql: select visual_effects_artists.name , programs.name from Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs join Programs on Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs.program_id = Programs.program_id join Visual_Effects_Artists on Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs.visual_effects_artist_id = Visual_Effects_Artists.artist_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?visual_effects_artists_programs a :Visual_Effects_Artists_Programs .
  ?programs a :Programs .
  ?visual_effects_artists_programs p:hasPrograms ?programs .
  ?visual_effects_artists a :Visual_Effects_Artists .
  ?visual_effects_artists_programs p:hasVisual_Effects_Artists ?visual_effects_artists .
  ?visual_effects_artists p:name ?name .
  ?programs p:name ?name2 .
}
